name: windsurf-api
description: Turn your Windsurf subscription into an OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible API server

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/index.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!')){fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)}" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s='src/dashboard',d='dist/dashboard';if(!fs.existsSync(d))fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(s+'/'+f,d+'/'+f))"
